mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos ( user_id, todo_date, title, content, status, priority, origin_type, modified_after_creation, routine_id, completed_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{todoDate}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{originType}, #{modifiedAfterCreation}, #{routineId}, #{completedAt}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, todo_date = #{todoDate}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, modified_after_creation = #{modifiedAfterCreation}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
